metadata.note: Baseline before docker-spinup-optimization. docker-advisor creates a new container per ephemeral use (2-5s startup per call). Isolation-level flow not yet present.

baseline_behavior.step_3_question: Is this data needed after today?
baseline_behavior.step_4_action: writes docker-compose.lqc.yml with new random container name + random port
baseline_behavior.cleanup: stops and removes container at session end

target_behavior.step_4_action: starts lqc-base-{db} once, creates lightweight namespace (<10ms)
